calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Sidney Sheray, Esq. for Plaintiff: Speck Cab Company dba Veterans Cab Company.
Plaintiff's Witness: Bonnie Barderini was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Robert Wankmueller as follows:
Balance on Damages $11,007.08
Costs $425.00, for a total of $11,432.08
Judgment signed in open court.
